Burning Ground deals 27% of the Fire Damage per Second of strongest Ignite on Enemy
Caustic Ground deals 80% of the Chaos Damage per Second of strongest Poison on Enemy
Can create each Ground effect no more than once each second
Gain 1 Flask Charge when you Hit a Cursed Enemy, no more than once every 3 seconds
